title: Introducing Zod 4: TypeScript-first schema validation
creator: @colinhacks
caption: Zod 4 is finally here! Faster, smaller, better TypeScript inference. github.com/colinhacks/zod
transcript: Zod 4 is now available. It is significantly faster than Zod 3, has a smaller bundle size, and includes much better TypeScript inference. Check it out on GitHub.
